[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01010110 4
1 01000000 1
2 10100111 5
3 00110100 3
4 01001101 4
5 11111111 a
6 10011010 4
7 01001110 4

01 10 00100100 2
12 21 00000100 1
23 32 01001101 4 match 4
34 43 10011010 4 match 6
45 54 00001010 2
56 65 01000110 3
67 76 01000000 1 match 1
70 07 00000000 a

02 20 00000101 2
13 31 00110100 3 match 3
24 42 00001000 1
35 53 01001110 4 match 7
46 64 00010010 2
57 75 01000000 1 match 1
60 06 00000110 2
71 17 00000000 a

03 30 10100111 5 match 2
14 41 00010000 1
25 52 01001100 3
36 63 01010110 4 match 0
47 74 00000000 a
50 05 00000110 2
61 16 00010100 2
72 27 01000000 1 match 1

04 40 10000010 2
15 51 00000100 1
26 62 01000100 2
37 73 01000000 1 match 1
